ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., ticker symbol) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock that triggered the alert */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., news website, financial journal) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., financial firm, independent analyst) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company profile */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the profile */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the profile */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the profile */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the profile */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the profile (e.g., financial firm, independent analyst) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_profiles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., financial firm, independent analyst) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
